codeReview.summary: Reviewed commit 73f86e9d34bcf6785c47896219338622c5d29408 against feature requirements. SalesService now threads request payment mode through legacy idempotency replay signature reconstruction (including missing-stored-signature paths), AccountingService reversal standard path now returns DTOs built from the saved reversal entity, and PurchasingService now rejects returns that would push outstanding below zero using ApplicationException(ErrorCode.RETURN_EXCEEDS_OUTSTANDING). Targeted regression tests were added/updated for all three bug areas and align with expected behavior.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Feature-level TDD requirement ('Write failing tests FIRST') is not clearly evidenced by transcript ordering, and current review signal can miss this gap.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: worker-transcripts.jsonl for session a72ba5b3-9322-457d-96b0-60dd3450a85e shows multiple ApplyPatch steps before the first feature-scoped test execution (`mvn test -Djacoco.skip=true -Dtest='*Sales*,*Accounting*,*Purchasing*' -pl .`), and no explicit red-phase failing run of the three new test cases appears before implementation edits.

sharedStateObservations.observation: backend-worker verification guidance conflicts with mission guidance, which can cause unnecessary/forbidden test command usage.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: AGENTS.md says DO NOT run `mvn test -T4` (use gate-fast/unit commands), while .factory/skills/backend-worker/SKILL.md Step 4 still instructs `cd erp-domain && mvn test -Djacoco.skip=true -T4`.

summary: Pass: the submitted implementation covers the three assigned bug fixes with no blocking code defects found in the reviewed diff; only shared-state/skill-process documentation gaps were observed.
